---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new criterion, annotation source, or workflow
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What clinical or analytical problem are you trying to solve? Why is the
current behaviour insufficient?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see. If it touches an ACMG criterion,
cite the underlying guideline document (ClinGen SVI, expert panel, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you weigh, and why is the proposed one preferred?

## Impact assessment

- Does this change move any existing variants between categories
  (Benign / LB / VUS / LP / Pathogenic)? If yes, roughly how many?
- Does it require new data sources or external tooling?
- Does it break backwards compatibility of the TSV format?

## References

PMIDs, DOIs, ClinGen documents, or upstream guideline links.
